看好菜色了嗎？

回官方 LINE 訂位

官方帳號：@zhenmei.house

禎　美　樓 中菜海味・餐酒宴席
高雄市前金區中華三路 65-6 號
菜色依時令略有調整，詳細訂席請洽服務人員
🍽
菜色照片
依實際內容物為主
依實際內容物為主
依實際內容物為主
// ── Carousel Lightbox ── var _lbcIdx = 0; var _lbcTotal = 5; function openDishCarousel(suite, name, desc, sub) { document.getElementById('lbc-suite').textContent = suite; document.getElementById('lbc-name').textContent = name; document.getElementById('lbc-desc').textContent = desc || sub || ''; lbcGo(0); document.getElementById('lbc').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function lbcGo(idx) { _lbcIdx = (idx + _lbcTotal) % _lbcTotal; document.getElementById('lbc-slides').style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (_lbcIdx * 100) + '%)'; document.querySelectorAll('#lbc-dots span').forEach((d,i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i===_lbcIdx)); } function lbcStep(dir) { lbcGo(_lbcIdx + dir); } function closeLbc() { document.getElementById('lbc').classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } function closeLbcOverlay(e) { if(e.target===document.getElementById('lbc')) closeLbc(); } // auto-rotate carousel every 3s when open setInterval(() => { if(document.getElementById('lbc').classList.contains('open')) lbcStep(1); }, 3000); var _lbc3Idx=0,_lbc3Total=3; function openDishCarousel3(suite,name,desc,sub){ document.getElementById('lbc3-suite').textContent=suite; document.getElementById('lbc3-name').textContent=name; document.getElementById('lbc3-desc').textContent=desc||sub||''; lbcGo3(0); document.getElementById('lbc3').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow='hidden'; } function lbcGo3(idx){ _lbc3Idx=(idx+_lbc3Total)%_lbc3Total; document.getElementById('lbc3-slides').style.transform='translateX(-'+(_lbc3Idx*100)+'%)'; document.querySelectorAll('#lbc3-dots span').forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('active',i===_lbc3Idx)); } function lbcStep3(dir){lbcGo3(_lbc3Idx+dir);} function closeLbc3(){document.getElementById('lbc3').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';} setInterval(()=>{if(document.getElementById('lbc3').classList.contains('open'))lbcStep3(1);},3000); var _lbc5Idx=0,_lbc5Total=5; function openDishCarousel5(suite,name,desc,sub){ document.getElementById('lbc5-suite').textContent=suite; document.getElementById('lbc5-name').textContent=name; document.getElementById('lbc5-desc').textContent=desc||sub||''; lbcGo5(0); document.getElementById('lbc5').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow='hidden'; } function lbcGo5(idx){ _lbc5Idx=(idx+_lbc5Total)%_lbc5Total; document.getElementById('lbc5-slides').style.transform='translateX(-'+(_lbc5Idx*100)+'%)'; document.querySelectorAll('#lbc5-dots span').forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('active',i===_lbc5Idx)); } function lbcStep5(dir){lbcGo5(_lbc5Idx+dir);} function closeLbc5(){document.getElementById('lbc5').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';} setInterval(()=>{if(document.getElementById('lbc5').classList.contains('open'))lbcStep5(1);},3000); var _lbc6Idx=0,_lbc6Total=6; function openDishCarousel6(suite,name,desc,sub){ document.getElementById('lbc6-suite').textContent=suite; document.getElementById('lbc6-name').textContent=name; document.getElementById('lbc6-desc').textContent=desc||sub||''; lbcGo6(0); document.getElementById('lbc6').classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow='hidden'; } function lbcGo6(idx){ _lbc6Idx=(idx+_lbc6Total)%_lbc6Total; document.getElementById('lbc6-slides').style.transform='translateX(-'+(_lbc6Idx*100)+'%)'; document.querySelectorAll('#lbc6-dots span').forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('active',i===_lbc6Idx)); } function lbcStep6(dir){lbcGo6(_lbc6Idx+dir);} function closeLbc6(){document.getElementById('lbc6').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';} setInterval(()=>{if(document.getElementById('lbc6').classList.contains('open'))lbcStep6(1);},3000);
